_meta.tool: get_trade_call (+ get_trade_signal alias — same producer getTradeSignal)
_meta.purpose: Public-response-shape SoT after the ADDITIVE referral arm. Supersedes get-trade-call-shape-snapshot-2026-06-20.json. ADDITIVE-ONLY: the success `_algovault` block MAY gain `upgrade_hint` (now also the keyed high-conviction/milestone aha referral line) + `referral_hint` (structured, allow-listed); the TIER_LIMIT_REACHED error envelope gains `referral_hint`. content[0] byte-position preserved (the referral string rides the existing human content item + the additive field). NO existing field removed/renamed (Data Integrity). outcome_return_pct / Phase-E outcome WR must NEVER appear in `referral_hint` (allow-list).

algovault_referral_additive_keys._algovault.upgrade_hint: EXISTING optional string. On the aha value moment for a KEYED user it now carries the high-conviction-call or usage-milestone REFERRAL line (was upgrade-only). Keyless aha keeps the upgrade hint verbatim. ≤1 aha referral/session (shouldShowAhaReferral).
algovault_referral_additive_keys._algovault.referral_hint: NEW additive, allow-listed structured object — present only when the aha referral fired (KEYED + session slot). Exactly {cta, link_or_path, bonus_calls, from}. Agent-relayable.

new_in_this_wave.referral_arm: REFERRAL-INPRODUCT-NUDGE-W1: the LIVE nudge generator gains a referral arm at the value moments. Limit wall = referral-prominent + upgrade-retained (state-adaptive: keyed → own algovault.com/join?ref=<code>; keyless → free-account get-your-link path). Aha = a light referral hint for KEYED users, ≤1/session across triggers (a) high-conviction first non-HOLD (confidence >= 70) + (c) usage milestone [25,50] (lifetime-deduped via quota_usage.milestone_referral_shown). Trigger (d) aha_verify ships its copy + enum value but is UNWIRED (resource reads carry no per-user attribution — deferred to OPS-REFERRAL-VERIFY-NUDGE-W{NEXT}).
new_in_this_wave.referral_hint.bonus_calls: INTEGER from the REFERRAL_TERMS SoT (BONUS_CALLS = 500). Never hardcoded in copy.
new_in_this_wave.referral_hint.link_or_path: KEYED → full https give-get link (shareLink); KEYLESS → free-account signup URL (api.algovault.com/signup?upgrade_from=<from>_referral). Never a fake link.
new_in_this_wave.message_only: No free-tier gating change (message-only). tools/list=9 byte-unchanged. Keyless tier byte-identical except the limit/aha message string.

error_contract.TIER_LIMIT_REACHED: {code, error_code, message, current_usage, monthly_limit, tier, suggested_upgrade_url, retry_after_days, referral_hint} — isError:true. message is referral-prominent + upgrade-retained; referral_hint {cta, link_or_path, bonus_calls, from:'limit'} is the additive structured field (NEW this wave).
error_contract.INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES: {error:'INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES', error_code, message, candles_available, candles_required, suggested_timeframes:[], suggested_action} — isError:true
error_contract.TRADFI_SYMBOL_UNSUPPORTED_ON_VENUE: {error_code, message, coin, requested_exchange, suggested_venues:[], probed_at} — isError:true
error_contract.note: Success envelopes carry NO referral_hint at top level — it rides inside _algovault. Only the limit ERROR envelope carries a top-level referral_hint.

additive_only_rule: top level + _algovault may GAIN referral_hint/upgrade_hint but never LOSE/RENAME any pre-existing key; content[0] stays the JSON envelope. A forbidden_key under referral_hint, a referral_hint with keys other than the 4 allow-listed, or a hardcoded bonus number = Factuality/Data-Integrity violation → HALT.
drift_check_command: cd ~/code/crypto-quant-signal-mcp && npx vitest run nudge-copy tier-limit-reached aha-event scan-trade-calls aha-referral-milestone   # referral arm copy (SoT numbers, no outcome_*), allow-listed referral_hint (4 keys), ≤1/session cap, milestone lifetime-dedup
consumers: MCP agent callers (Claude/Cursor/ChatGPT) via tools/call — read the human upgrade_hint string + the structured referral_hint (relay to the human principal)
algovault-bot (Telegram) — parses content[0] JSON (unaffected; content[0] byte-position preserved)
src/lib/cross-asset-grid.ts (internal grid refresh; receives NO referral arm — internal calls skip nudges)
